title: Shiny Horses - Enchantable Horse Armor
description: This allows you to enchant your horse armors at the Enchantment Table or Anvil, giving the horse armor the same enchantments as your own armor.
body:
This mod allows you to enchant your horse armors at the Enchantment Table or Anvil, giving the horse armor the same enchantments as your own.

It's a port of [this mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enchantable-horse-armor) to the most recent versions of Minecraft!
